message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'psmgr_create' sets signal field 'psmgr_session.validated', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=psmgr_session;field=validated;offset=6] [oracle:assert=psmgr_session.validated stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets validated without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
